# Fleet Advisor — deterministic rule catalogue

Rule table version: **1** · 14 rules.

| Rule | Severity | Class | Tiers | Signal | Title |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `L-WARM-01` | high | IT-actionable | F1 F2 F3 F4 | `dispatch.keepAliveMissing` | Dispatch issues no keep_alive; models cold-evict between calls |
| `L-WARM-02` | med | IT-actionable | F1 F2 F3 F4 | `warm.hotModelNotResident` | Hot-path model not resident at session start |
| `L-OFFLOAD-01` | high | IT-actionable | F2 F3 F4 | `offload.hotPathCpuSpill` | A routinely-dispatched model is CPU-offloaded (size_vram < size) on the hot path |
| `L-HOST-01` | high | IT-actionable | F2 F3 F4 | `hosts.policyHostUnreachable` | A policy-listed fleet host is unreachable |
| `L-HOST-02` | low | informational | F2 | `hosts.singleHostButLoadBalanceImplied` | Only one host reachable but policy implies load-balancing |
| `L-ROSTER-01` | med | IT-actionable | F2 F3 F4 | `roster.noGpuResidentStrongModel` | No GPU-resident-capable strong model installed for the detected VRAM |
| `L-QUANT-01` | low | IT-actionable | F2 F3 F4 | `quant.largerThanBestFit` | A model's quant is larger than the best fit for available VRAM |
| `L-STAKES-01` | high | IT-actionable | F2 F3 F4 | `stakes.noGateThirtyTwoBOnCommonPath` | No deterministic 7B/32B stakes gate; 32B is on the common path |
| `L-TOOL-01` | med | IT-actionable | F1 F2 F3 F4 | `tool.agenticDisabledOrUnhealthy` | Fleet agentic tool-use disabled/unhealthy while the panel is the only reviewer |
| `L-ENGINE-01` | low | IT-actionable | F1 F2 F3 F4 | `engine.versionStale` | Inference engine version is stale beyond N minor releases |
| `L-OBS-01` | low | IT-actionable | F1 F2 F3 F4 | `obs.noTelemetrySevenDays` | No fleet telemetry emitted in the last 7 days |
| `L-FAULT-01` | med | IT-actionable | F1 F2 F3 F4 | `fault.recentTransient` | A one-off GPU OOM / driver reset / engine crash in the recent log window |
| `L-ENGINE-02` | low | IT-actionable | F3 F4 | `engine.higherThroughputEngineUnused` | A higher-throughput engine (vLLM/TGI) is installed but unused for concurrent agentic load |
| `L-CLOUD-01` | med | IT-actionable | F0 F1 | `cloud.noFreeProvidersWired` | No free-cloud providers wired and no local fleet to fall back on |

## Recommendations

- **L-WARM-01** — Set a per-model keep_alive in cascade-dispatch so hot-path models stay resident (eliminates the cold-load stall).
- **L-WARM-02** — Warm the hot-path model on SessionStart so the first dispatch is not a cold load.
- **L-OFFLOAD-01** — Route the hot path to a GPU-resident model; reserve the offloaded model for high-stakes only (or add VRAM — client gate).
- **L-HOST-01** — Diagnose + repair the unreachable host (network/mesh/engine); until then load-balance across the reachable hosts.
- **L-HOST-02** — Either bring a second host online (F3) or remove the load-balance assumption from policy.
- **L-ROSTER-01** — Pull a strong model that fits GPU-resident at the detected VRAM (throughput-per-watt best fit).
- **L-QUANT-01** — Re-pull the model at a quant that fits GPU-resident (e.g. Q4_K_M) to avoid CPU spill.
- **L-STAKES-01** — Add a deterministic stakes gate — routine coding to the GPU-resident 7B, 32B reserved for genuine high-stakes.
- **L-TOOL-01** — Enable + health-check fleet tool-use (grammar-constrained output) so agentic calls are dependable.
- **L-ENGINE-01** — Upgrade the engine to pick up throughput + correctness fixes (review release notes first).
- **L-OBS-01** — Wire the fleet-advisor observability signal so tokens/sec + cold-load + fallback rate are measured.
- **L-FAULT-01** — Surface the transient fault to IT for review; never cache/suppress it (it may recur under load).
- **L-ENGINE-02** — Review moving concurrent agentic load to the continuous-batching engine already installed.
- **L-CLOUD-01** — Wire the $0 free-cloud providers (keys) so there is a zero-cost substrate; note the break-even point where a local fleet would pay off.
